title: Battle of Foerost (disambiguation)
content:
There were several '''battles for [[Foerost]]''':

==Canon==
*[[Battle of Foerost]] which [[Captain]] [[Tabor Seitaron]] considered a triumph in his career
*A [[demolitions job on Foerost]] by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|rebels]] including the [[Paodok'Draba'Takat Sap'De'Rekti Nik'Linke'Ti' Ki'Vef'Nik'NeSevef'Li'Kek|Pao]]

==Legends==
*[[Battle of Foerost (Great Sith War)|Battle of Foerost]] in the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]
*[[Battle of Foerost (Jedi Civil War)|Battle of Foerost]] in the [[Jedi Civil War]]
*[[Battle of Foerost (Clone Wars)|Battle of Foerost]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]

{{Disambig}}

|de=Schlacht von Foerost
